advantages: Non-blocking concurrency keeps apps responsive during slow I/O.
async/await reads like sequential code, far clearer than nested callbacks.
Combinators (all/race/allSettled/any) express common concurrency patterns simply.
disadvantages: await in a loop is accidentally sequential and slow.
Unhandled rejections can crash or silently swallow errors.
Mixing callbacks, .then and await can get confusing.
Forgetting to await leaves a dangling Promise and a bug.
